claim_boundary.integrity_verifier_vs_experiment_reader: capsule integrity code may hash sealed bytes, but only exact member-local reads enter the experiment; the access log proves A349 score content entered only after selector freeze

reconstruction_and_evaluation.workspace_components: reference, approximation and error float64 fields plus two uint16 rankings; Python object heap and top-k sets not measured
